signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY | NO** | **MED confidence**  
South Korea's Consumer Price Index for March 2026 showed **2.16% year-over-year inflation**, up slightly from 2.00% in February 2026, with a 0.34% month-to-month rise; data updated April 2, 2026.[2]  
No announcements or resolutions today (April 17, 2026) impact annual forecasts, as next update is May 6, 2026; 20
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
